description: Perf fixes: fetchpriority=high on card-back LCP image, gate migrateLocalToAccount+upsertUserRow behind sessionStorage flag (once per session).
notes: card-back WebP resize (#2 from diagnosis) deferred — asset pipeline task. CSS concatenation and GTM defer also deferred. Authorization expanded to js/main.js because the LCP card-back element (button.card-slot > img.card-back) is built in js/main.js:360-365, not js/reading.js — confirmed via Lighthouse selector trace.
